title: ELS Declares First Quarter 2026 Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Equity Lifestyle Properties Inc (NYSE:ELS) announced a first quarter 2026 dividend of $0.5425 per common share, representing an annualized dividend of $2.17 per common share. The dividend will be paid on April 10, 2026 to stockholders of record as of March 27, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.5425 per share with an annualized rate of $2.17, demonstrating consistent capital returns to shareholders. Dividend declarations are generally viewed positively as they indicate financial health and management confidence in future cash flows.

title: ELS Reports Fourth Quarter Results
author: Prnewswire
description: Equity Lifestyle Properties (NYSE:ELS) reported fourth quarter and full year 2025 results with continued strong performance. The company announced its 22nd consecutive annual dividend increase, setting the 2026 dividend at $2.17 per share (5.3% increase). Key highlights include 4.8% core portfolio income growth, 362 expansion sites added, and 439 new home sales. The company provided 2026 guidance and noted strong rental income growth across manufactured housing and RV/marina segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong operational performance with 4.8% core portfolio income growth exceeding long-term averages, announced its 22nd consecutive annual dividend increase of 5.3%, achieved 5-year compounded dividend growth of 8.5% (significantly above sector average of 5.2%), and provided positive 2026 guidance. Normalized FFO per share grew 5.0% year-over-year, and the company successfully added 362 expansion sites and 439 new home sales during 2025.

title: ELS Announces Tax Treatment Of 2025 Distributions
author: Prnewswire
description: Equity Lifestyle Properties Inc (NYSE: ELS) announced the tax treatment of its 2025 common stock distributions. The December 26, 2025 distribution with a record date includes $0.096655 per share considered a 2026 distribution for federal tax purposes. The company also disclosed section 1061 disclosures showing $0.00 per share for applicable partnership interests.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine tax disclosure for dividend distributions with no material business developments, operational changes, or financial impacts indicated. It is informational in nature for tax compliance purposes.

title: ELS Declares Third Quarter 2025 Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Equity Lifestyle Properties (ELS) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.515 per common share, payable on October 10, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 26, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is maintaining consistent dividend payments, owns 455 properties with 173,340 sites, and demonstrates financial stability through regular shareholder distributions

title: Mortgage Applications Jump 11% As Buyers Rush In Ahead Of Fed Decision
author: Piero Cingari
description: Mortgage applications surged 11% last week as buyers rushed to take advantage of slightly lower interest rates ahead of the Federal Reserve's policy decision. The jump signals a resurgence in housing market activity amid mixed economic signals.
